description: Self-hosted semantic memory over MCP for an engineering team's tacit knowledge. Needs Postgres.
name: io.github.tribal-memory/tribal

environmentVariables.description: Postgres (pgvector) connection string. Tribal is self-hosted; you provide the database. The supported, complete deployment is docker-compose.yml.
environmentVariables.name: TRIBAL_DATABASE__URL

environmentVariables.description: First-run only: the git remote that identifies the project bootstrapped on first start.
environmentVariables.name: TRIBAL_PROJECT_REMOTE

environmentVariables.description: First-run only: the name of the project bootstrapped on first start.
environmentVariables.name: TRIBAL_PROJECT_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Containerised transport: http or sse. The Docker image does not serve stdio; install the binary for stdio.
environmentVariables.name: TRIBAL_SERVER__TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Address the server binds inside the container. Must be 0.0.0.0 (not the loopback default) for the published port to be reachable.
environmentVariables.name: TRIBAL_SERVER__BIND_ADDRESS

environmentVariables.description: The URL clients use to reach the server (for example http://127.0.0.1:8725/mcp). Needed for OAuth dynamic client registration once the server binds a routable interface.
environmentVariables.name: TRIBAL_PUBLIC_MCP_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional; only if an ingest or retrieval stage is configured to use OpenAI (defaults target a local Ollama).
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional; only if a stage is configured to use Anthropic.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

title: Tribal
